name: agent-toolbox
description: The agent-toolbox `toolbox` CLI + a typed client library for the broker.

scripts.prepare: esbuild client/src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=client/dist/index.cjs --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" && esbuild client/src/lib.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --outfile=client/dist/lib.cjs && tsc -p client/tsconfig.lib.json
